label: Top Markets
description: Top prediction markets by volume as quick-access cards with category and liquidity indicators.

l0.notes: All 9 checks green. 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=['predictions-trading']. 0.3: availableOn=['predictions']. 0.4: no any or @ts-ignore. 0.5: no lib/mocks/ imports. 0.6: synchronous mock context — no isLoading; usePredictionsData() throws on missing provider, caught by WidgetErrorBoundary. 0.7: explicit guard — if (topMarkets.length===0) returns 'No markets available' centered div. 0.8: no error field in context; WidgetErrorBoundary (0.1) covers throw. 0.9: no dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — markets read via usePredictionsData() only; top-6 sort is local memo. 1.2 PASS — context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3-1.5 N/A — markets list is a global market catalogue (not per-org/client/strategy); market filtering in context is by category/venue/search, not by scope. Scope filtering applies to positions, not the market catalogue itself. 1.6 PASS — all markets shown regardless of scope. 1.7 KNOWN-GAP — MOCK_MARKETS in lib/mocks/fixtures/; future scope.

knownIssues.description: Market catalogue (MOCK_MARKETS) is global — not filtered by org/client/strategy scope by design. Scope filtering applies to positions only. 1.3–1.5 marked N/A.
Reference data (MOCK_MARKETS) lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/ rather than lib/constants/; moving is future scope.
